title: Smart Aquarium Controller
description: Arduino-based aquarium automation system controlling water temperature, lighting schedule, and top-off pump via a DS18B20 temperature probe, RTC-triggered relay, and MOSFET-driven DC pump. Displays live readings on an OLED and alerts on temperature excursions.
objective: Maintain water temperature within ±0.5 °C of setpoint (25 °C); automate 8 h/16 h lighting cycle; top off evaporation daily; alert if temperature deviates > 2 °C for > 5 min.
constraints: 5 V USB power; ≤ £25 BOM; single Arduino Nano; I²C bus for all peripherals; no cloud or WiFi dependency.
supporting_fact_titles: I²C Real-Time Clock — DS3231 Timekeeping and Alarms
Solenoid Valve for Pneumatic and Fluid Control
N-Channel MOSFET as a Low-Side Power Switch

element_usage_notes.DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array: Single waterproof probe; 12-bit mode; polled every 5 s; on-chip alarm registers set to 23 °C / 27 °C trigger interrupt for buzzer.
element_usage_notes.DS3231 RTC Alarm Scheduling Module: Alarm 1 fires at 08:00 daily (lights on); Alarm 2 fires at 22:00 (lights + pump off). INT pin on Arduino INT0.
element_usage_notes.N-Channel MOSFET Low-Side Load Switch: IRLZ44N gate driven by Arduino D5 (lights relay coil) and D6 (top-off pump, 12 V DC submersible). Flyback diodes on both.
element_usage_notes.SSD1306 OLED Display UI Module: Two-line layout: line 1 = water temp + setpoint; line 2 = lights status + pump status. Refreshed every 2 s.
element_usage_notes.Arduino Uno/Nano MCU Platform: Nano 3.0; I²C on A4/A5; DS18B20 on D2; buzzer on D7; 5 V USB from mains adapter.

element_interactions.description: Temperature read every 5 s. If |temp_c − setpoint| > 2 °C for three consecutive readings, Nano drives D7 HIGH (buzzer alarm) and logs event to Serial.
DS3231 INT asserts LOW at 08:00 and 22:00. ISR reads RTC time, determines which alarm fired, and toggles lights/pump MOSFET accordingly.
MOSFET gates driven directly from Nano digital pins. Lights MOSFET switches 12 V relay coil; pump MOSFET switches 12 V DC submersible pump directly (≤ 0.5 A).
OLED refreshed every 2 s over I²C. Shows temperature with ±0.5 °C tolerance band indicator and relay state icons.
